## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Vapi and GrowthX teams to discuss progress on SEO, content, and programmatic page development.](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic page development is ongoing; GrowthX to push progress by EOD tomorrow, Vapi may assist over weekend to accelerate launch](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Editorial content production on track: 2 pages indexed, 3 more posts in review, 6 total blogs by end of tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Vapi launching "Vapi for Creators" program next week to encourage more YouTube/social content creation](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [SEO strategy focuses on becoming authoritative source through content, social presence, and programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

## Topics

### Vapi's YouTube Presence

  - [Mostly organic coverage by influencers, with some recent paid collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Suggestion to create articles from video content for dual-medium approach](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Launching "Vapi for Creators" program next week to incentivize content creation](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [Includes affiliate links, promotion via Vapi channels, potential paid collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [Aims to leverage existing organic traction on YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

### Programmatic Page Development

  - [GrowthX creating template config JSON object for rendering components](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Current blocker: lack of dedicated front-end developer on GrowthX side](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Marcus (GrowthX) to push as much progress as possible by EOD tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Vapi team may assist over weekend to accelerate launch if needed](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Goal: Unblock first build to enable start on JSON objects for additional pages](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Editorial Content Progress

  - [2 pages already indexed (published Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [3 more posts in review, 1 to be published tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Total of 6 blogs expected by end of tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Timeline expectations:](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [\~1 month for initial indexing](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [\~3 months for good signals and potential conversions](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining publishing pace and accumulating content over time](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

### SEO Strategy and LLM Chatbot Indexing

  - [Domain authority crucial for snippet inclusion and AI summary features](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Branding becoming increasingly important for authority signals](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Strategies to improve visibility:](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [Leverage YouTube presence for authentic, original content](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
      - [Increase social media presence (Reddit, LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [Focus on producing unique, experience-based content](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Aim for top Google rankings to improve chances of AI answer inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [GrowthX to send template posts for Vapi team review](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Focus on open-source products for reviews to avoid conflicts with partners](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Careful positioning when mentioning competitors in alternative/comparison posts](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

### Vapi Challenge Ideas

  - [Potential to leverage challenge to highlight PSEO pages](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Suggestion to link PSEO docs in the ideas section of the Notion website](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Use showcase page to promote use cases](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send 1 post for review today, 2 posts tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Marcus (GrowthX) to share programmatic page progress by EOD](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Vapi team to review sent posts and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on placing components, Vapi may assist with styling](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Aim for consistent pace of \~5 posts per week starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Continue calibration phase for editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Vapi team to set aside time tomorrow for content review](https://fathom.video/share/EEuQZH27CUwDMu_s_VVT8-yEL3fxxFRt?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
